message:
feat(fcp-sdk): implement shared SigV4 signer substrate for AWS-family connectors

New sigv4 module providing correct AWS Signature Version 4 signing
that all AWS-family connectors (aws, s3, dynamodb, etc.) can share:

- SigV4Signer: stateless signer with clock injection for tests
- AwsCredentials: redaction-safe (secret_access_key/session_token
  never appear in Debug output)
- SignableRequest: canonical request components with payload hashing
- SignedRequest: Authorization header + X-Amz-* headers
- PresignedUrl: query string presigning for temporary URLs
- SigningScope: region/service scoping
- HMAC-SHA256 signing key derivation (4-round cascade)
- URI encoding per AWS SigV4 rules (RFC 3986 unreserved set)

16 tests covering: key derivation determinism/isolation, canonical
request assembly, signing determinism, session token inclusion,
presigning, payload hashing, credential redaction, URI encoding.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -13,6 +13,10 @@ workspace = true
 
 [dependencies]
 async-trait.workspace = true
+chrono.workspace = true
+hex.workspace = true
+hmac.workspace = true
+sha2.workspace = true
 fcp-async-core = { path = "../fcp-async-core" }
 fcp-core = { path = "../fcp-core" }
 fcp-kernel = { path = "../fcp-kernel" }
@@ -23,6 +27,7 @@ jsonschema.workspace = true
 reqwest = { workspace = true, optional = true }
 semver = { workspace = true, optional = true }
 serde.workspace = true
+percent-encoding = "2"
 serde_json.workspace = true
 thiserror.workspace = true
 tracing.workspace = true
